name: Solana Trading Bot
postCreateCommand: npm ci && cp -n .env.example .env && node -e "const c=require('crypto'),fs=require('fs');const e=fs.readFileSync('.env','utf8');if(!e.includes('WALLET_ENCRYPTION_SECRET=') || e.includes('change_this')){fs.writeFileSync('.env',e.replace(/WALLET_ENCRYPTION_SECRET=.*/,'WALLET_ENCRYPTION_SECRET='+c.randomBytes(32).toString('hex')));console.log('✔ Generated WALLET_ENCRYPTION_SECRET');}"
postStartCommand:
echo '

✅ Bot dev environment ready!
   1. Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN in .env
   2. Run: ./deploy.sh rpc
   3. Run: npm run dev
'
